detail: Keep the lane as the first holdings-aware sell-side binding surface; it now consumes only carried start-of-day inventory.
Preserve reconciliation rows and clipping behavior so later EOD reduce/close actions cannot double-consume carried inventory.
Do not widen scope yet; next justified work is attribution and quality audit of this isolated lane, not replay binding.
Keep the branch sell-side only and continue excluding reentry execution and full replay binding.
